svg.text: A fractal of infinite complexity from a simple rule

text.tspan: Every smaller triangle is an exact
copy of the whole shape. Zoom in

text.tspan: Start with one triangle. Remove the
centre to get three smaller copies.
Repeat on each copy — that’s recursion!
